nasb.text: and he made its five pillars with their hooks, and he overlaid their tops and their bands with gold; but their five sockets were of bronze.

esv.text: and its five pillars with their hooks. He overlaid their capitals, and their fillets were of gold, but their five bases were of bronze.

cnv.text: 又為門簾做了五根柱子和柱子上的釘子，用金子把柱頂和橫杆包裹。但那五個座是銅的。

ccb.text: 用皂荚木做五根挂门帘的柱子，上面有金钩，柱顶和横杆包上金。柱子的五个底座是铜造的。
